originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent

originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingTop="16dp">
<!-- Greeting --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_greeting" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/>
<!-- Quote --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_quote" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end"/>
<!-- Weather --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_weather" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/>
<!-- Date strip --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_date_strip" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:clipToPadding="false"/>
<!-- Today's habits label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_today_habits" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Habits list --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_habits" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingBottom="80dp"/>
<!-- FAB --> <com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/fab_add_habit" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="end|bottom" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:contentDescription="Add Habit" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_input_add"/>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" android:orientation="vertical" android:background="?attr/colorSurface">
<!-- Header --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingHorizontal="16dp" android:paddingTop="16dp">
<!-- Greeting --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_greeting" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textSize="24sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/>
<!-- Quote --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_quote" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary" android:maxLines="2" android:ellipsize="end"/>
<!-- Weather --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_weather" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:textSize="13sp" android:textColor="@color/text_secondary"/>
<!-- Date strip --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_date_strip" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal" android:clipToPadding="false"/>
<!-- Category filter chips --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_category_filter" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:clipToPadding="false" android:orientation="horizontal"/>
<!-- Today's habits label --> <TextView android:id="@+id/tv_today_habits" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="12dp" android:textSize="18sp" android:textStyle="bold" android:textColor="@color/text_primary"/>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Habits list --> <androidx.recyclerview.widget.RecyclerView android:id="@+id/rv_habits" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="0dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:clipToPadding="false" android:paddingBottom="80dp"/>
<!-- FAB --> <com.google.android.material.floatingactionbutton.FloatingActionButton android:id="@+id/fab_add_habit" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="end|bottom" android:layout_margin="16dp" android:contentDescription="Add Habit" android:src="@android:drawable/ic_input_add"/>
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/nav_graph" app:startDestination="@id/loginFragment">
<fragment android:id="@+id/loginFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.onboarding.LoginFragment" android:label="User Details" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_login"> <action android:id="@+id/action_loginFragment_to_onboardingFragment" app:destination="@id/onboardingFragment" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/onboardingFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.onboarding.OnboardingFragment" android:label="Onboarding" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_onboarding"> <action android:id="@+id/action_onboarding_to_home" app:destination="@id/homeFragment" app:popUpTo="@id/onboardingFragment" app:popUpToInclusive="true" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/homeFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.home.HomeFragment" android:label="Home" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_home"> <action android:id="@+id/action_home_to_addHabit" app:destination="@id/addHabitFragment" /> <action android:id="@+id/action_homeFragment_to_habitDetailFragment" app:destination="@id/habitDetailFragment" /> <action android:id="@+id/action_homeFragment_to_archivedHabits" app:destination="@id/archivedHabitsFragment" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/addHabitFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.addhabit.AddHabitFragment" android:label="Add Habit" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_add_habit" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/habitDetailFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.habitdetail.HabitDetailFragment" android:label="Habit Detail" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_habit_detail">
<argument android:name="habitId" app:argType="long" android:defaultValue="-1L" />
<action android:id="@+id/action_habitDetailFragment_to_editHabitFragment" app:destination="@id/editHabitFragment" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/editHabitFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.edithabit.EditHabitFragment" android:label="Edit Habit" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_edit_habit">
<argument android:name="habitId" app:argType="long" android:defaultValue="-1L" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/archivedHabitsFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.archived.ArchivedHabitsFragment" android:label="Archived Habits" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_archived" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/progressFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.progress.ProgressFragment" android:label="Progress" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_progress" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/communityFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.community.CommunityFragment" android:label="Community" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_community" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/profileFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.profile.ProfileFragment" android:label="Profile" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_profile" />
</navigation>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <navigation xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:app="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res-auto" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/nav_graph" app:startDestination="@id/loginFragment">
<fragment android:id="@+id/loginFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.onboarding.LoginFragment" android:label="User Details" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_login"> <action android:id="@+id/action_loginFragment_to_onboardingFragment" app:destination="@id/onboardingFragment" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/onboardingFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.onboarding.OnboardingFragment" android:label="Onboarding" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_onboarding"> <action android:id="@+id/action_onboarding_to_home" app:destination="@id/homeFragment" app:popUpTo="@id/loginFragment" app:popUpToInclusive="true" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/homeFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.home.HomeFragment" android:label="Home" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_home"> <action android:id="@+id/action_home_to_addHabit" app:destination="@id/addHabitFragment" /> <action android:id="@+id/action_homeFragment_to_habitDetailFragment" app:destination="@id/habitDetailFragment" /> <action android:id="@+id/action_homeFragment_to_archivedHabits" app:destination="@id/archivedHabitsFragment" /> </fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/addHabitFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.addhabit.AddHabitFragment" android:label="Add Habit" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_add_habit" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/habitDetailFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.habitdetail.HabitDetailFragment" android:label="Habit Detail" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_habit_detail">
<argument android:name="habitId" app:argType="long" android:defaultValue="-1L" />
<action android:id="@+id/action_habitDetailFragment_to_editHabitFragment" app:destination="@id/editHabitFragment" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/editHabitFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.edithabit.EditHabitFragment" android:label="Edit Habit" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_edit_habit">
<argument android:name="habitId" app:argType="long" android:defaultValue="-1L" />
</fragment>
<fragment android:id="@+id/archivedHabitsFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.archived.ArchivedHabitsFragment" android:label="Archived Habits" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_archived" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/progressFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.progress.ProgressFragment" android:label="Progress" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_progress" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/communityFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.community.CommunityFragment" android:label="Community" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_community" />
<fragment android:id="@+id/profileFragment" android:name="com.example.habitpal.presentation.profile.ProfileFragment" android:label="Profile" tools:layout="@layout/fragment_profile" />
</navigation>
